text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That was close. I very nearly yawned in your
presence...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I beg your pardon. Lately, I have been finding it
difficult to fall asleep at night.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My brain starts churning out multiple variations of
different schedules the moment I lay down.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Once presented with these options, I start
pondering which version is the most efficient,
and... Urgh... Here I go, thinking about them
again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Eishin Flash hasn't been getting much
rest recently...
